title: Call to Battle - Franco-Prussian War Addon
description: Call to Battle's Franco Prussian War addon adds content from the War of 1870! Experience black powder single shot rifles like the Dreyse Needle Gun and Chassepot, with Victorian Era uniforms!
body:
![Call to Battle WW2 Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7574e3821ff263123d2332039a6abcd485bc0e9f.png)

Ready to enter the Victorian Era? This addon for Call to Battle adds weapons and armor from the War of 1870. Experience black powder weaponry like the Dreyse Needle Rifle and Chassepot!

**Don't have Call to Battle? It's a massive World War II conversion mod! Get it here:**
[https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/567b4066ce706dc81c95a21a12fa402b02b88a7a.png)

Call to Battle - Franco Prussian War adds weapons and armor from the War of 1870.

Currently there is a Imperial French uniform and Chassepot Rifle, a Prussian uniform and Dreyse Needle Rifle, and more to come! :)

Requires base Call to Battle here:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2)

![Social Media](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/007c45f590bd22b6563afe69d574f5a5e290611e.png)
